messages.content:
Which of the following is a Layout Design Consideration?

Higher utilization of space, equipment, and people

Improved flow of information, materials, or people

Flexibility

All other choices
All other choices.

Who of the following is mainly responsible for determining HOW the product is to be produced?

Product designer

Business owner

Process designer

Schedule designer
Process designer.

Decisions regarding the products to be produced are generally made by upper-level management based on input from…

Marketing

Manufacturing

Finance

All other choices
Marketing.

“a document that is created by simulationist to describe exactly what will be delivered, when, how, and by whom” is the definition of …

Stakeholder

Functional specification

Word document

Object
Functional specification.

The probability of going from current state to same state is always.

1

0

0.5

0-1

The saddle point should be ---- in a fair game.

0

≠ 0

+1

∞

A researcher recruits 80 students for a study. Half of the students attend a review session for an exam. The remaining students study as they normally would for the exam. After the exam, the researcher compares the scores of the two groups. To analyze the obtained results, the research should be use:

One-way ANOVA

Two-way ANOVA

Paired t-test

two-samples t-test
Two-samples t-test.

Which of the following is not one of the three principles of Experimental Design?

Randomization.

Blocking.

Replication.

Interaction.
Interaction.

To analyze a Randomized Block Design (RBD), we should use

One-way ANOVA

Two-way ANOVA

Paired t-test

two-samples t-test
Clear my choice
One-way ANOVA.

The second stage of the product life cycle is:

Introduction

Decline

Growth

Maturity
Growth.

In which distribution network design is product shipped directly from the manufacturer to the end customer, bypassing the retailer (who takes the order and initiates the delivery request)?

Manufacturer storage with direct shipping

Manufacturer/distributor storage with customer pickup

Distributor storage with last mile delivery

Distributor storage with package carrier delivery
Manufacturer storage with direct shipping.
